# Styrene Signs

### Lightweight, Flexible, and Reliable Signs

 

![Apex tradeshow styrene sign | Banners.com](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/sliderImages/d6a4fa65d9174b36af64b4a0393d5d39.jpg)

 

 

 

*   [Product Overview](#81bb1a6b-13a7-4791-83c5-e02ec24475aa)

\*\* All Styrene signs over 32" x 48" in either direction will be shipped via freight. For more information on freight pricing, please visit our [oversized flat shipping page](https://www.banners.com/oversized-signs-flat-shipping) or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-391-5300. \*\*

#### [Material](#materialCollapse)

### Styrene Material 

Styrene signs are printed on a 0.03" or 0.06" thick PVC plastic sheet. 0.03" Styrene is very flexible and can be rolled and packed in a tube for storage or shipping. 0.006" Styrene is more rigid thus cannot be rolled for shipping. We recommend using styrene indoors, but technically you can use them indoors and outdoors. While this material does not have a laminate, we do use UV resistant ink. When properly installed and maintained, this UV resistant ink can withstand outdoor exposure for 3-5 years. 

#### Sizing

The maximum print for styrene signs is a 4-foot by 8-foot sign. 

All 0.06" Styrene signs over 32" x 48" or any sign where the H + W is 81 inches or greater are shipped via freight.

For more information on freight pricing, please visit our [oversized flat shipping page](https://www.banners.com/oversized-signs-flat-shipping) or contact one of our customer service representatives at: 320-965-9300.

[Click here to request a smaple packet of materials.](https://www.banners.com/sample-packet-request) 

#### [Artwork](#artworkCollapse)

#### [Artwork Guidelines](#artwork-guidelinesCollapse)

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

#### [Artwork/Order Proofs](#artworkorder-proofsCollapse)

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

#### [Color Match Proof System](#color-match-proof-systemCollapse)

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

#### [Production Times](#production-timesCollapse)

### Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

#### **1 Business Day Priority:**

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

![1 Business Day Priority Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-1 Business Day Priority.jpg)

*   **Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,**
*   **Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,**
*   **Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.**
*   **Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.**

#### **2 Business Days Express:**

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

![2 Business Day Express Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-2 Business Days Express.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### 3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

![3 Business Day Standard Infographic](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-3 Business Days Standard.jpg)

*   Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### \>5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

![5 Business Day Saver](https://lag.azureedge.net/w2p-cms-1/22-09-14-BANS-production time infographic-5 Business Days Saver.jpg)

*   Orders received after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
*   Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
*   Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
*   Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

#### [Payment](#paymentCollapse)

All sintra signs must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. [For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.](https://blog.banners.com/2013/05/online-orders-we-now-accept-checks.html).

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

#### [Shipping](#shippingCollapse)

#### [General Shipping Guidelines](#general-shipping-guidelinesCollapse)

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. 

**You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.**

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery. Please [visit our shipping information page](https://www.banners.com/shipping-info) for more information about our styrene sign shipping times.

**International shipping Notes:**

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

#### [Shipping Methods](#shipping-methodsCollapse)

We offer the following shipping methods:

Economy ( 5–10 Business Days )

Standard ( 3-5 Business Days )

Three Day ( 3 Business Days )

Two Day ( 2 Business Day )

Overnight (1 Business Day)

**Economy Shipping**

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

**Did we answer all your questions?**

If not, please give us a call at [(320) 391-5300](tel:13203915300) and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Custom styrene signs provide you with a lightweight yet professional signage solution. Thanks to their full-color properties and durable styrene plastic, these signs offer a perfect balance of a crisp appearance and smooth finishing that makes them an exceptional option for trade shows, general retail displays, presentations, menus, and even directional signage! Our custom styrene signs are available in multiple thickness options and a vast array of sizes, meaning that regardless of short or medium term, your styrene sign will come out exactly the way you want it, all while being easy to transport and mount.

## More About Custom Styrene Signs [Return to Top](#top)

Styrene signs are an effective and inexpensive signage option for trade shows, menus, posters, and so much more. This material is constructed from an expanded plastic that creates an excellent and unique printing surface for vibrant, eye-catching colors that will capture attention.

Styrene is also super lightweight and flexible, making the material a multi-purpose signage solution. It is great for indoor as well as outdoor use. We offer two thicknesses to choose from .03” and .06”. Each option offers long-lasting durability. The .03” styrene is slightly more flexible, making it easier to roll up and store, while our .06” option is stronger and more rigid. Order your custom styrene sign today!

Think of styrene signs as flexible, but tough little visual helpers. They can be used just about anywhere, inside or outside and used for almost anything from displaying artwork to advertising an avocado stand. If you can think of a purpose for a small nifty sign, then a styrene sign can fulfill it.

### Three Easy Ways to Order Custom Yard Signs

**Online Designer**

Create your own design using our online design tool. Customize your yard sign with background, clipart images, text or upload your own graphics.

**Upload a File**

Upload your own artwork (.eps, .pdf, .jpg). For more information, check out the Product Info tab above.

**Professional Designer**

Our team of professional graphic designers are able to create a custom design for you. Upload any artwork you want on your lawn sign and provide instructions for us.

## Frequently Asked Questions [Return to Top](#top)

### What are styrene signs?

Styrene signs are lightweight PVC sheet signs printed on **0.03"** (flexible/rollable) or **0.06"** (more rigid) material. They’re commonly used for small to medium indoor displays and short-term signage.

### Can I order custom-shaped styrene signs?

No—custom shapes are not currently available for styrene signs.

### Can styrene signs be printed double-sided?

Yes—styrene signs are available **single-sided or double-sided**.

### What colors are used to print styrene signs?

Styrene signs are digitally printed in **full CMYK color**.

### Can styrene signs be used outdoors?

Styrene can be used outdoors, but it’s best for **indoor use** because it does not include a protective laminate and colors may fade with outdoor exposure.

### How should I store styrene signs?

Store styrene signs in a dry, temperature-stable place to prevent warping and scratches. If your sign is double-sided, place protective sheets between signs during storage.

### What are common uses for styrene signs?

Styrene signs are popular for **menus**, **trade show displays**, **promotions/posters**, and **directional signage** in retail stores and malls.

### Can I request a proof before printing?

Yes—request a **PDF proof** to review before production, and printing begins only after you approve it.

### What production times do you offer, and when does turnaround start?

Production options range from **1–5 business days**, and turnaround starts after file upload is complete (or after **approval** if a proof is requested or prepress flags the order). Orders approved after **5:00 PM CST** are processed the next business day, and delivery time includes **production plus shipping**.

## Why Choose Banners.com?

**Customer Service**

Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

**Fast Turnaround**

Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

**Quality Products**

Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

**Live Order Tracking**

Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
